prompt: For a protein engineering research program, develop variants of BRAF (Kinase) from Homo sapiens with altered substrate specificity or improved catalytic efficiency. outline a computational methodology covering: (1) active site scaffold selection, (2) catalytic residue placement using RoseTTAFold, (3) substrate binding optimization and variant screening. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
source_citation: Derived from open_targets (24.06); target: BRAF; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0
